title: St. Mary's Church, Noida
tagline: St. Mary's Church, Noida — spiritual town of Uttar Pradesh

heroImage.alt: St. Mary's Church, Noida, Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: St. Mary's Church, Noida is a much-loved spiritual town in Uttar Pradesh, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Mary's Church is the first Catholic parish in the city of Noida, India and is dedicated to the Assumption of Our Lady. It comes under the Agra Diocese of the Roman Catholic Church. The parish lies on the north-western tip of Agra Diocese, bordering with the Delhi Diocese on the west and Meerut Diocese on the north.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Noida Sector 34 metro station
topPlaces.description: The Noida Sector 34 is a metro station on the Blue Line extension of the Delhi Metro railway, in the city of Noida in India.

topPlaces.name: Noida City Centre metro station
topPlaces.description: Noida City Centre (also called Wave City Center) is a station on the Blue Line of the Delhi Metro. It was the terminal station of the Blue Line - Main Line till 8 March 2019.

topPlaces.name: Noida Sector 52 metro station
topPlaces.description: Noida Sector 52 is a metro station on the Blue Line extension of the Delhi Metro in the city of Noida, India. The station is not connected to the Noida Sector 51 metro station on the Noida Metro's Aqua Line.

topPlaces.name: Noida Sector 51 metro station
topPlaces.description: The Noida Sector 51 is the elevated northern terminal metro station on the north–south corridor of the Aqua Line of Noida Metro in the city of Noida, Uttar Pradesh. It was opened to the public on 25 January 2019.

topPlaces.name: Noida Sector 61 metro station
topPlaces.description: The Noida Sector 61 is a metro station on the Blue Line extension of the Delhi Metro railway, in the city of Noida in India.

topPlaces.name: Modi Mall
topPlaces.description: Modi Mall, formerly named Spice World Mall and Smart Bharat Mall, is a shopping mall in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India. The mall was opened in 2013 and is adjacent with Noida Cricket Stadium.

topPlaces.name: Rainbow metro station
topPlaces.description: The Rainbow metro station (formerly known as Noida Sector 50) is an elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Aqua Line of Noida Metro in the city of Noida, Uttar Pradesh. It was opened on 25 January 2019.

topPlaces.name: Nithari Village
topPlaces.description: Nithari Village is a village in Noida the western part of the state of Uttar Pradesh, India, bordering on New Delhi. A large number of residents in the village are economic migrants from states such as Bihar and West Bengal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Church, Noida?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Church, Noida is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Church, Noida?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (26 km) and the nearest railway station is New Delhi Railway Station (15 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Church, Noida?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Church, Noida at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Church, Noida?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Church, Noida start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Church, Noida?
faq.a: The top attractions are Noida Sector 34 metro station, Noida City Centre metro station, Noida Sector 52 metro station, Noida Sector 51 metro station, Noida Sector 61 metro station.
